_note: Real usage.input_tokens captured from claude-haiku-4-5 via the live Anthropic Messages API on 2026-06-03 (max_tokens=1, single user text message). TypeScript is a strongly typed programming language that builds on JavaScript, giving you better tooling at any scale. It adds static type definitions, which can be used to describe the shape of an object, providing better documentation and allowing TypeScript to validate that your code is working correctly.
